title: Larks & Labyrinths
description: Gather your friends and tackle Dungeons, Mazes, Labyrinths, and take part of the tale that you make as your own!
body:
![Modpack Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4a477405424e1f8a0b99533ecc5ba3398fd86981_0.webp)
## The Labyrinths await you... Calling from the eternal...

Welcome to Larks & Labyrinths, a world of wonder and magic, danger and curiosity. A world that is your own, and you make the story!

### This project is discontinued!

Content:
- Level up your Player, Armor, and Weapons.
- Find new and exotic items with Better Archaeology.
- Overhauled Terrain Generation with Better Nether/End.
- Hundreds of new structures.
- Claim land and build your kingdom.
- Tiered Weapons and Armors.
- Voice Chat Integration.
- And More!

The Official Server:
- Join the discord for more information of joining!
- Custom Weapons, Armors, and Quests.
- Overhauled terrain and New Structures.
- Trading between players and NPC's.
- Join a story that has been 6 years in the making!

### Make sure you put in 8-9gb of ram in the instance!

Larks & Labyrinths is a pack designed for our server, but is also great for Singleplayer! Build your own safe haven within your singleplayer worlds, or tread in the dangerous waters of the world of Larks & Labyrinths!
